name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that outputs polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce visually cluttered, template-heavy slides that feel impersonal and require heavy manual cleanup. Chronicle 2.0 targets professionals who need the speed of AI assistance without sacrificing visual taste or brand integrity. It bridges the gap between fast generation and high-quality, human-feeling output.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks that look bespoke rather than AI-generated
Building client-facing proposals quickly without designer involvement
Producing internal strategy presentations with consistent visual quality
Turning raw notes or outlines into structured, presentation-ready slides
